ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources for the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication for better searchability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in press, submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the dataset is associated with */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., MRI, genetic, imaging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, NIfTI) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "access_restrictions" TEXT /* Access restrictions on the dataset (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last modified */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount for the study */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborating institutions or researchers */,
  "publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications resulting from the study */,
  "data_sharing_policy" TEXT /* Policy for data sharing and access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the investigator (e.g., Professor, Research Scientist) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location for communication */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications the investigator has contributed to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the participant (e.g., Alzheimer's, healthy control) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of neurological disorders */,
  "lifestyle_factors" TEXT /* Lifestyle factors that may influence the study (e.g., diet, exercise) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., given, pending, withdrawn) */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's last visit to the study site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_data" (
  "genetic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the genetic data is associated with */,
  "gene" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "allele_1" TEXT /* First allele of the gene */,
  "allele_2" TEXT /* Second allele of the gene */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype (combination of alleles) */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the genetic data file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the genetic data (e.g., blood, saliva) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the genetic data was collected */,
  "data_processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the genetic data */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the genetic data */,
  "variant_count" INTEGER /* Number of genetic variants identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genetic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_data" (
  "imaging_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the imaging data is associated with */,
  "imaging_type" TEXT /* Type of imaging (e.g., MRI, PET) */,
  "imaging_date" TEXT /* Date the imaging was performed */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the imaging data file */,
  "imaging_modality" TEXT /* Modality of the imaging (e.g., 3T MRI, 7T MRI) */,
  "imaging_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the imaging */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the imaging data */,
  "anatomical_structure" TEXT /* Anatomical structure imaged */,
  "data_analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes on data analysis and findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
